title: Enhanced Vanilla Minecraft (+)
description:
An enhanced version of Vanilla Minecraft using the simply optimized modpack as baseline for performance improvements,

featuring enhanced
- visuals
- sounds
- gui 
- and atmosphere by adding most notably Distant Horizons, Tectonic & fresh animations,
body:
# Enhanced Vanilla Minecraft (+)

An **enhanced version of Vanilla minecraft** using the _simply optimized_ modpack as baseline for **performance improvements**.

![Distant Horizons & Tectonic (optional version)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f2581aa2033be1b10769d5cf627b1b921aa6bc1.jpeg)

## feautures

This pack also offers for **easy multiplayer** using either the Essential mod or e4mc.

This modpack **enhances visuals, sounds, gui and atmosphere** by adding many little mods and resource packs.

most notably:

- huge **performance improvements** (one of the best performance modpacks out there as base line)

- **Distant Horizons** and **Tectonic** world generation with **shader compatibility** (optional in the versions Tab)
  
- **Fresh animations** and **not enough animations** with **first person model** for more immersive gameplay (also more mob variants with fresh animations and addons)
  
- **better sounds** and **ambience** (birds, wind and lots more depending on biome and scenery)
  
- **smoother gui** and lots more to enhance the base game just enough to make it feel fresh and exciting again.


![enhanced visuals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6149f2c593e6e7664da75851f29e47b0a2f374ec.jpeg)


## modlist (most notable)

Many more mods and resource packs that enhance Minecraft in this pack are for example the following:

- Advancement Plaques, Legendary Tooltips
- Ambient Sounds, Mambience, Presence Footsteps, Sounds
- Appleskin, Eating Animation
- More Mob Variants - Fresh Animations, Fresh Moves
- Animated Doors
- Better Clouds
- Visuality, Wakes, Particular
- Better MountHud
- Better Stats, Advancements
- Blur, Bounced, Icons
- Cameroverhaul, Camera Utils, Better third Person
- Chat Heads, Chat Animation
- Continuity, Entity Model, Texture, Sound -Features
- Fancy Health Bar, Held Item Info, Highlighter, Tiny Item Animations, Mouse Tweaks
- Immersive Thunder, Iris
- Jei, Jade, No Resource Pack Warnings
- Show me your skin, 3D skin layers, talk bubbles
- smooth gui, smooth scrolling
- Xaeros Minimap and World Map
- colorful containers, better flame particles, Banner pattern clarity
- Fancy Crops, Blinking Ender Eyes, Enchant Icons, Emissive Trim Armors
- Fast Better Grass, Mace3D, low shield and fire
- MinecraftTen Font, Refined Enchants, Tender Dragon

![Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/260a8bca4a2c8ee3ef0b804f7b6e2cee147c3cd9.png)

## shader issues & solutions

Currently I can't add the _Bliss shader_ on Modrinth, so you'll need to add it your own if you want the beautiful atmospheric time of day fog you see in some screenshots.

The _Super Duper Vanilla shader_ seems to currently offer no dynamic handheld light so if you want to have that while using the shader, you can add a "_dynamic light(s)/torches_" mod your own. I've just seen the mods causing problems with other shaders that do have dynamic lighting already integrated, so I left it out.

The best working shader is _Complementary_ and with the _Euphoria Patches_ it also offers the most features to really enhance the vanilla experience
